name: Koryojyuhan Co., Ltd.
summary: Koryojyuhan Co., Ltd. operates as a real estate company. It provides rental agency and monthly apartment handling services; and elderly housing and pay nursing home facilities. The company is also involved in the real estate brokerage and purchase/sale businesses; sale of residential land; and development and sale of real estate properties. In addition, it provides leasing management services, including rental management, vacant house management, and subleasing services; and revenue real estate consulting services. Further, the company operates coin parking, coin laundry, and trunk room and bike garage; and photovoltaic power generation facility. Koryojyuhan Co., Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Mito, Japan.
